title: APC UPS SNMP Battery Replacement Prediction from Age and Impedance
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-30d
| eval age_months=tonumber(coalesce(battery_age_months, ""))
| eval imp=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvBatteryReplaceIndicator, upsSmartBatteryReplace, battery_replace_flag, ""))
| eval bad=if(age_months>36 OR imp=2 OR match(lower(_raw), "(?i)replace battery"),1,0)
| where bad=1
| stats latest(age_months) as age_months values(ups_name) as ups by host
description: End-of-life batteries collapse runtime suddenly; SNMP replace indicators and age heuristics schedule swaps before failure.
value: Avoids simultaneous multi-string failures after a heat wave.
implementation: (1) Validate vendor-specific replace OID mapping. (2) Integrate with procurement SKU.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
